items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC posts Q1 2026 NII of $0.21/share, NAV rises to $7.90, authorizes $5M buyback
items.snippet: AFC reports first quarter as a BDC with NII of $4.8M ($0.21/share) and NAV of $7.90, up from $7.46, while authorizing a $5M share repurchase program.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC expands revolving credit facility to $80M with $30M add-on from bank partner
items.snippet: AFC upsizes its senior secured revolving credit facility to $80 million with an additional $30 million commitment from its lead arranger.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC reports Q4 and full-year 2025 results, GAAP net loss $(0.95)/share for full year
items.snippet: Advanced Flower Capital reports Q4 2025 GAAP net income of $0.04/share and full-year 2025 GAAP net loss of $(0.95)/share with distributable earnings of $0.39.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Financial Statements and Exhibits

8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Termination of Material Agreement · Modifications to Holder Rights · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Amendments to Charter / Bylaws · Item 5.05 · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC completes conversion from REIT to BDC effective January 1, 2026
items.snippet: Advanced Flower Capital completes its previously announced conversion from a real estate investment trust to a business development company, effective January 1, 2026.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC posts Q3 2025 results; shareholders approve REIT-to-BDC conversion, distributable earnings $0.16/share
items.snippet: AFC reports Q3 2025 distributable earnings of $0.16/share ($3.5M) and GAAP net loss of $(0.57)/share; shareholders approve conversion to BDC.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC shareholders approve company's conversion to a business development company
items.snippet: Advanced Flower Capital (AFCG) shareholders approved its conversion to a business development company structure on November 6, 2025.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC posts Q2 2025 distributable earnings of $0.15/share, plans BDC conversion
items.snippet: AFC reports Q2 2025 distributable earnings of $0.15/share and announces intention to convert from mortgage REIT to a business development company.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC expands revolving credit facility to $50M with $20M add-on from bank partner
items.snippet: Advanced Flower Capital expands its senior secured revolving credit facility to $50 million with a $20 million additional commitment from its lead arranger.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote

items.headline_ai: AFC posts Q1 2025 results: GAAP net income $0.18/share, distributable earnings $0.21/share
items.snippet: Advanced Flower Capital reports Q1 2025 GAAP net income of $4.1M ($0.18/share) and distributable earnings of $4.5M ($0.21/share).

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC renews senior secured revolving credit facility with FDIC-insured bank lead
items.snippet: Advanced Flower Capital renews its senior secured revolving credit facility, expandable to $100 million, with a lead commitment from an FDIC-insured bank.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC posts Q4 2024 distributable earnings $1.68/share, declares $0.23 Q1 2025 dividend
items.snippet: Advanced Flower Capital reports full-year 2024 distributable earnings of $1.68/share ($34.9M) and declares a $0.23 per share dividend for Q1 2025.

items.snippet: Advanced Flower Capital reports Q3 2024 distributable earnings of $0.35/share ($7.2M) and pays its first post-spinoff dividend of $0.33 per share.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Regulation FD Disclosure · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: AFC Gamma announces spin-off of commercial real estate portfolio into independent Sunrise Realty Trust
items.snippet: AFC Gamma announces board approval to spin off its CRE portfolio into Sunrise Realty Trust, targeting completion in mid-2024 to create two pure-play lenders.

items.headline_ai: AFC Gamma appoints Daniel Neville as CEO; Tannenbaum transitions to Chief Investment Officer
items.snippet: AFC Gamma appoints Daniel Neville as CEO effective November 13, 2023; Leonard Tannenbaum transitions from CEO to Chief Investment Officer.

items.headline_ai: AFC Gamma appoints Jim Fagan as independent director to its board
items.snippet: AFC Gamma appoints James C. Fagan as an independent director, effective June 13, 2023, bringing over 40 years of commercial real estate experience.
